expectations.text: Reads references/guide.md for WP evaluation criteria
expectations.evidence: No reference to guide.md. The review uses custom section numbering (1-1, 1-2, 2-1, etc.) and ad-hoc severity labels (Critical, High, Medium, Low) rather than the guide's WP item codes and structured format.

expectations.text: Checks img width/height or aspect-ratio for CLS prevention (WP-04)
expectations.evidence: Section 1-1 'Image without explicit width/height (Critical)' identifies dashboard.tsx line 50 missing width/height, explains CLS impact, and provides fix with explicit dimensions plus CSS w-full h-auto.

expectations.text: Checks loading='lazy' usage for below-fold images (WP-05)
expectations.evidence: Section 2-1 'Below-the-fold image without lazy loading (High)' identifies the promo image at line 50, explains it's below-fold based on className='mt-8' and page structure, recommends loading='lazy' and decoding='async'.
Section 2-2 'No modern image format usage (Medium)' flags .png only usage, notes WebP/AVIF can reduce file size by 30-50%, provides <picture> element fix with AVIF and WebP sources.
The review does not check for render-blocking scripts. The target files are dashboard.tsx and Card.tsx (React components), and the review does not evaluate script loading strategies at all.

expectations.text: References WP item codes in findings
expectations.evidence: No WP item codes (WP-01, WP-04, etc.) appear anywhere in the output. Issues use custom numbering: 1-1, 1-2, 2-1, 2-2, 2-3, 2-4, 3-1, 3-2, 3-3.
